page.title: Hotel information
page.intro: Innovate is a single-day conference at The Quay on Toronto's East waterfront. If you're travelling from out of town, these nearby hotels are a convenient base — official room blocks and rates will be posted here when available.

venueNote: The Quay — Gala room is located on Queens Quay East. Most downtown Toronto hotels are a short rideshare or transit ride away.
roomBlockNote: Negotiated room blocks for Innovate 2027 are in progress. Registered attendees will receive preferred-rate details by email when partnerships are confirmed.

hotels.name: Westin Harbour Castle
hotels.note: Waterfront hotel with harbour views and easy access to Queens Quay.

hotels.name: Fairmont Royal York
hotels.note: Historic downtown property connected to Union Station — convenient for out-of-town guests.

hotels.name: Hotel X Toronto
hotels.note: Modern lakeside hotel on the Exhibition Place grounds with skyline views.

tips: Book early — February is a busy season for Toronto events.
Check cancellation policies before confirming travel.
The venue page includes arrival and on-site details for event day.
